reply:
[[BLOCK:slide11_shape1]]
Zero indicates no explained variance.  
If a straight line is fitted to the data, the line will be flat (horizontal).  
If the model performs worse than a horizontal line and contradicts the data pattern, the adjusted R-squared (R平方 (R-squared)) may be negative.  
Including too many predictors in the model can result in performance worse than having no model at all.  
Analogy: Taking the wrong medication or a placebo when ill may lead to worse outcomes than taking no medication.
